content.en:
In the years that followed, Ye Tian had been working hard to collect resources in the Fragmented Void of Time and Space, and since he could stay in the Fragmented Void of Fragmented Time and Space for a long time, he did not need to return.

Therefore, in the years to come, he would harvest resources with an extremely high frequency, and relying on these resources, his cultivation would improve extremely quickly.

......

"There are a lot of Extreme Path Ultimate Treasure Fragments here, it seems to be an important battlefield!" Ye Tian collected these Extreme Path Ultimate Treasure Fragments that he saw, and he could smelt them into his own weapons and enhance the power of his weapons.

Anyway, he is very poor now, he lacks everything, so naturally he wants everything.

Fortunately, the other Ultimate Extremes couldn't stay in the Space-Time Shatter for a long time, otherwise these good things wouldn't have been his turn, and they would have been taken away by the Doomsday Extremes long ago.

A long time has passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian's "Three-Six-Seven" cultivation also used those resources to gradually improve, and it was very close to the limit of the top ultimate supreme.

Moreover, his physical body is also very, very terrifying.

Although he has no opponents in this era, it only includes the ultimate supreme beings of this era, and those ultimate ancient demons are still asleep, and no one knows when they will wake up.

Therefore, Ye Tian must improve his strength as soon as possible, at least break through to the peak ultimate supreme realm as soon as possible.

At that level, even if it was against some ultimate ancient demons, he was sure.

Before I know it, the long years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's son, Ye Xingchen, has finally completed the transformation of the life pattern, and in addition, he has cultivated to the limit in other aspects, and he can impact the ultimate supreme realm.

In order to help his son break through, he gave his son some treasures obtained from the Fragments of Time and Space that would help him impact the Ultimate Extremity.

Not long after, Ye Xingchen successfully broke through to the Ultimate Extreme Venerable Realm.

Soon, Doomsday Extreme Venerable and Shadow Sand Extreme Venerable came to congratulate them, they never expected that Li Changsheng would actually cultivate his son to the ultimate supreme realm.

If they were allowed to cultivate their own descendants, they would not be able to cultivate to the ultimate supreme realm.

And what shocked them was still to come, Ye Tian continued to cultivate his wife and daughter, spending countless resources to pile them up to the ultimate supreme realm.

In this way, the human race gave birth to a total of four Ultimate Extreme Lords, as well as a large number of Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lords.

Seeing that the human race was so strong, the other Ultimate Extreme Masters were also envious, but they couldn't follow Ye Tian's example, after all, they didn't have so many resources, and they didn't dare to enter the space-time shattered void.

Very long years later.

Ye Tian had already cleaned up the many fragments of the space-time shattered void one by one, found a lot of resources, and even obtained a few space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Treasure fragments, but he had comprehended them in the past time and space.

But now, after he truly comprehended, he found that the space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Treasure Fragment of the true space-time and space was even more powerful, and the effect of his comprehension was even better.

After all, the past time and space are the past time and space, and the power of the past time and space cannot truly project the power of such treasures.

Now, having comprehended the true space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Treasure Fragment, he continued to deduce and analyze, which also made his several space-time level Extreme Path Ultimate Arcanes more powerful.

this day.

Ye Tian's cultivation finally broke through.

Rumble!!!

He has crossed from the top Ultimate Extreme Extreme to the level of the Peak Ultimate Extreme Extreme, and his physical body is more than a hundred times stronger than the Peak Ultimate Extreme of Doom, and he can kill the Peak Ultimate Extreme Extreme of the Doomsday Extreme with his breath.

At this point, his real battle was no less than that of the Ultimate Ancient Demon, and if he fought desperately, it was not impossible to kill a weaker Ultimate Ancient Demon.

Of course, he still has to continue to practice penance, to improve his physical body, and to improve his ultimate will.

Under the tempering of the ultimate rules of the Extreme Dao that he comprehended, he finally condensed the ultimate will to the level of the ultimate will of the Extreme Dao on this day.

At this point, his strength has skyrocketed again.

Another day.

Doomsday Supreme came to visit.

"Ten Thousand Laws are Extremely Venerable!"

Doomsday Exalted shouted.

"Doomsday Extreme Venerable, what are you looking for me?" Ye Tian asked.

Doomsday Jizun looked at Ye Tian, his whole body was trembling, Ye Tian's breath was too terrifying, even if it was restrained, but the wisp of aura that emanated made him like a mortal facing the Divine Mountain.

He knew that Ye Tian's strength had improved again, and it had reached the level that he looked up to.

"There's a hint of a change in the place where the old demons are sleeping......"

Doomsday is extremely respectful.

Ye Tian's face changed, if there was a change there, it would be a big deal.

Swish!

Ye Tian instantly crossed the void and headed there.

Soon, he came to the place where the ultimate ancient demon and a large number of ancient demon-level powerhouses fell, and sure enough, some changes had been discovered here.

Before, there was silence here, but now there is a fluctuation, which is the oscillation of the energy of space-time particles.

Whoa!!!

Doomsday Extreme Venerable and Shadow Sand Extreme Venerable all came here, but they didn't speak, waiting for Ye Tian to speak.

"Sure enough, something happened, I don't know if this change will make these ultimate ancient demons wake up!" Ye Tian frowned.

The Doomsday Supreme Venerable asked, "Ten Thousand Law Supreme, if these ancient demons awaken, it will be a disaster! To them, the Ultimate Supreme Venerable of our era is not only weak, but also scarce in number, and even a fraction of them can't compare. "

"Don't worry, according to my calculations, they won't wake up in a short time. Ye Tian said.

"Ten Thousand Law Extreme Venerable, are you sure to deal with them?"

Doomsday Supreme asked.

"If I break through to the Extreme Dao Ultimate Extreme Venerable, even if I can't kill them all, I will make them jealous and dare not mess around. Ye Tian said.

"Then we will count on Wanfa to honor you!"

These Ultimate Extreme Exalted Voices 1.0 are all about it. []

"Let's go back!"

Ye Tian turned around and left, and the other Ultimate Extreme Venerables also left one by one.

And not long after Ye Tian left, in this sleeping place, in a sleeping solitary void, a huge ancient demon body appeared a slight shock, and then opened his eyes, his consciousness awakened, but his body moved.

"I'm not dead!"

"This body is terrible, it will take time to repair!"

"The other ancient demons are also sleeping, it seems that everyone has failed!"

"Forget it, recover your strength first, and then go out and have a look after your strength recovers. "

Hamoro said darkly.

Immediately, he restrained his breath and fluctuations, and silently began to use space-time particles to repair his body and restore his strength.

And just like that, another long time passed.
